name: Evo

etymology.composed_gloss: the thing that kept unfolding when it should have stopped

void.gloss: cold ash before the coal catches

structure.gloss: weathered iron, the frame that survived

signal.gloss: ember, the live coal — warmth that earned its color

memory.gloss: banked ember, the warm gone deep and held

life.gloss: oxidized teal, the check-line — cool that stays honest

shadow.gloss: patina-dark, teal gone to deep green-black

illumination.gloss: pale sky-teal, cold clean air around the coal

reliqery.note: the first-ignition role; reserved until the grammar is exercised in motion

the_archivist_says: the coal that should have gone cold is the one still giving light.
